step.title: Load epics
step.action: Read the epic documents from docs/planning-artifacts/ and identify epics ready for decomposition.

step.title: Select epic to decompose
step.action: Choose the next epic to break down into stories based on priority and dependencies.

step.title: Write story with acceptance criteria
step.action: Write a user story with clear acceptance criteria, following the "As a... I want... So that..." format.
Ensure each acceptance criterion is testable and specific.

step.title: Set traces_to
step.action: Link the story back to its parent epic using traces_to metadata.

step.title: Produce story file
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with story details.
